notes: Per-site trendy_et_median site classifications (all networks). Column 'trendy_et_median_bin': existing 7-bin hybrid (unchanged). Column 'trendy_et_median_bin_30': new 30-bin hybrid added. 30-bin scheme: bin 1 = < 5 mm yr-1; bins 2–30 = 29 equal-area quantile bins. 29 breakpoints (mm yr-1): 5.0, 28.1, 56.2, 88.7, 118.7, 148.6, 173.8, 198.4, 223.6, 248.2, 272.8, 298.5, 322.2, 350.2, 378.9, 410.6, 445.7, 491.0, 545.2, 611.5, 682.7, 749.6, 813.4, 881.4, 954.8, 1000.1, 1000.1, 1000.1, 1000.1.
